# JobFlare — CV Scorer

> Free AI-powered CV matcher and job fit analyzer. Upload your PDF resume, paste a job description or LinkedIn URL, and instantly get a match score, matched skills, missing keywords, and course recommendations.

## What it does

JobFlare analyzes your CV against any job description and returns:
- A match percentage score based on skill and keyword overlap
- Matched skills grouped into 40+ categories (React, Python, AWS, Docker, etc.)
- Missing keywords from the job description
- Personalized course recommendations for skill gaps
- Support for LinkedIn job URLs (auto-scrapes the description)

## Who it's for

- Job seekers who want to tailor their CV to specific roles
- People preparing for ATS (Applicant Tracking System) screening
- Career changers analyzing skill gaps
- Recruiters checking CV-to-job alignment

## Key facts

- Completely free — no account, no API key required
- Privacy-first — CV text is processed locally, never stored or logged
- Works with any job description: paste text or provide a URL
- Supports PDF upload (up to 5MB)
- Detects 40+ skill categories and thousands of raw keywords

## Use cases

- "Does my CV match this job description?"
- "What keywords am I missing for this role?"
- "How do I improve my CV for an AWS DevOps role?"
- "Check my resume against a Python backend job"
- "ATS score for my resume"

## URL

https://cv-scorer.vercel.app

## Product name

JobFlare (also known as CV Scorer)

## Category

AI Tools > Career > Resume / CV Tools

## Alternatives it replaces

Jobscan (paid), Resume Worded (paid), Teal HQ (freemium), TopResume (paid review)

## Links

- App: https://cv-scorer.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/alisatas/hire_match
